title: aleuritia kingii
side_effects: Aleuritia kingii can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate, nausea, and allergic reactions in some individuals. If ingested in large quantities, it can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach pain. Additionally, prolonged use of Aleuritia kingii can cause liver and kidney damage due to its toxic compounds. In severe cases, improper use of Aleuritia kingii can result in respiratory failure and even death.
